_publications._publicationTitle: Combined MEK inhibition and BMP2 treatment promotes osteoblast differentiation and bone healing in Nf1Osx -/- mice.

_contextSnippet: ...callus formation was severely impaired in Nf1 osx −/− mice compared to WT mice, as visualized by the formation of an atrophic callus 21 days post-fracture...
details: Callus formation was severely impaired with atrophic callus 21 days post-fracture, significantly smaller calcified callus tissue volume, lower tissue mineral density and BV/TV
